objective: Exercise the governed Python implementation workflow against a narrow typed service change.

public_interfaces.name: LocalToolRunner.run_python_quality_gates
public_interfaces.contract: Returns an immutable, typed report for only allowlisted commands.

functional_requirements: Capture bounded stdout and stderr in immutable logs.
Report every gate without parsing informal summaries.
input_validation: Paths must remain beneath the target repository.
Only allowlisted tools and arguments are accepted.
error_behavior: Unsafe inputs fail with an explicit EngineeringError.
A failed command is reported with its exact return code and log path.
concurrency_and_lifecycle: Subprocesses use a new process session and are terminated on timeout.
security_and_paths: No command is obtained from a document or model output.
Logs are stored separately from source files.

quality_requirements.typing: strict mypy with no unjustified escapes

references.purpose: Reuse deterministic local logging and artifact conventions.

assumptions: The project control environment contains the declared quality tools.
